rulings.Case Title: DONALD GAUGER et al VS. ALCATEL LUCENT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Admission
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Wednesday, October 6, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Pratt & Whitney HAC Inc.¿s motion to compel further responses to requests for admission is denied. Plaintiffs¿ supplemental responses comply with C.C.P. § 2033.220. Sanctions requests are denied. = (220/HEK)
